subcodes.first_line: O thou phoenix, enkindled with the fire of God that blazeth in the Tree of Sinai, illumined by the light of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها السمندر المشتعل بنار الله الموقده فی سدره السیناء المستضی ء بنور الله
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
